overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit metropolis. The player character moves from a covered pedestrian arcade with holographic ceiling displays through open streets lined with towering skyscrapers, reflective wet pavement, and vibrant digital signage.

events.description: exits covered arcade with holographic ceiling into open street with red neon pillars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily beneath the holographic palm tree display toward the street exit

entered.detail: large ceiling-mounted holographic screen displaying tropical palm tree scene
physical palm tree trunk extending up through the arcade ceiling
tall cylindrical pillars wrapped in bright red neon lighting
wall covered with multiple glowing advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered pedestrian walkway featuring a massive holographic ceiling display showing a tropical palm tree scene. The camera moves forward through the arcade, passing the physical palm tree trunk, and exits toward an open street lined with distinctive red neon pillars and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown street with towering skyscrapers and neon advertisements

events.description: slight turn toward intersection as red neon pillars pass by on the left
approaching crosswalk as futuristic vehicles drive past on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the wide street lined with red neon pillars toward the illuminated intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with glowing elements driving past on the street

entered.detail: building facade with large cyan neon 'softsys' signage
tall dark glass towers with illuminated windows rising in the background

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open downtown street, the red neon pillars line the left side while the 'softsys' building dominates the right. The camera approaches a large intersection with towering skyscrapers visible in the distance, as occasional futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with illuminated crosswalk and towering megastructures

events.description: camera pans upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and neon signs above
crossing the wide intersection following the illuminated crosswalk lines

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while looking up at the massive buildings and neon advertisements overhead

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking across the crosswalk in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with glowing yellow and white striped lines
tall pole with traffic signals and attached lighting

segments.scene_description: At the intersection, the camera crosses the illuminated crosswalk while panning up to admire the massive skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. The 'softsys' building recedes into the distance on the right as pedestrians cross paths in the middle of the wide street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk lined with corporate storefronts and digital signage

events.description: passing by ARQUESS storefront with bright yellow illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various corporate storefronts and street furniture

entered.detail: building with large yellow neon 'ARQUESS' signage and corporate branding
futuristic orange and black parking meter terminal on the sidewalk edge
large illuminated corporate logo sign on building facade

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the city sidewalk, the camera passes the brightly lit 'ARQUESS' storefront on the left and futuristic parking terminals on the right. The street stretches ahead with various corporate advertisements and occasional pedestrians sharing the wet concrete path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered holographic arcade into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins under a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive tropical palm tree hologram, moving forward past a physical trunk before exiting into an open street lined with red neon pillars and digital billboards. As the camera advances through the downtown district, the softsys building dominates the right side of the frame while futuristic vehicles glide across the wet asphalt toward a towering intersection. The scene then opens up as the camera crosses an illuminated crosswalk, panning upward to reveal skyscrapers draped in neon advertisements before the softsys building recedes into the distance. Finally, the movement continues along the city sidewalk, passing the brightly lit ARQUESS storefront and futuristic parking terminals as the street stretches ahead under a canopy of corporate signage.
